instructions: This is a monorepo with multiple projects under development/.
Tech stack: TypeScript with Bun (not Node.js), React 19, Shadcn/ui v4, Tailwind CSS v4, Zod, Zustand.
Python projects use FastAPI + Pydantic v2 with uv for package management.
Prefer interfaces over types in TypeScript. Avoid enums — use const objects.
Use function declarations for React components, not arrow functions with FC.
Always use early returns and guard clauses.
Flag any hardcoded secrets, API keys, or credentials.
Flag any use of console.log in production code (should use proper logging).
Flag missing error handling in async functions.
Flag any direct DOM manipulation in React components.
Check for proper Zod validation at API boundaries.
This is a medical/healthcare adjacent project — flag any potential PHI/PII exposure.
